summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for Alberto Filgueiras website iteration 4. All 16 requested features verified and passing. Major changes confirmed: popup floats at bottom-right with NO overlay/blur, 'Quem Sou Eu' moved after CTA, 'EXPERIÊNCIA PROFISSIONAL' heading (not TRAJETÓRIA), champion photo in hero with CSS mask, 4 photos in carousel, 13 institutions with logos/names, credentials before education, books section on Home and Services, new /livros page with 4 books, new /curso-psicologia-processos-basicos page with 12 YouTube lectures, updated navigation with all tabs.
critical_code_review_comments: All data is MOCKED - no real backend implementation
Contact form submission shows toast but doesn't actually send data
Login form is non-functional (just shows toast, no actual authentication)
Amazon links use a.co short URLs which work correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is iteration 4 of frontend-only prototype. All data is mocked. Key changes verified: 1) Popup floats at bottom-right corner with NO overlay/blur - page content fully visible behind 2) Popup uses sessionStorage, appears after 2 seconds 3) 'Quem Sou Eu' section moved to END of Home page (after green CTA section) 4) 'EXPERIÊNCIA PROFISSIONAL' heading replaces 'TRAJETÓRIA PROFISSIONAL' 5) Champion photo removed from carousel, now in hero section with CSS mask effect 6) Carousel has 4 photos (Flamengo, Voleibol de Praia, Futebol training, Cairns Taipans) 7) 13 institutions with logos and full names listed below experience carousel 8) Credentials card (CRP 05/43557) appears BEFORE education section 9) Books section at end of Home page with 4 books, covers, descriptions, Amazon links 10) Books section also at end of Services page 11) NEW /livros page with full book descriptions and Amazon links 12) NEW /curso-psicologia-processos-basicos page with 12 YouTube lecture embeds 13) Course description mentions UERJ and 2020-2022 14) Navigation has all tabs: Home, Serviços, Cérebro em Alta Performance, Livros, Curso Psicologia e Processos Básicos, Contato 15) Footer has all updated links 16) /programa-cerebro-alta-performance route works
